title: narcissus gayi var. praelongus
intro: Narcissus gayi var. praelongus is a variety of the Narcissus gayi plant, commonly known as the 'Praeelongus' or 'Long-flowered Narcissus', which belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus gayi var. praelongus include its potential to treat pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers in water or oil to create a remedy that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
